summary: Iteration 33: Verified all 4 backlog items implementation. (1) Server-side rate limiting in functions/index.js with enforceMessageRateLimit and sendPushNotification rate limits. (2) Collection pagination in firestoreService.js with fetchMoreGames and fetchMoreTournaments. (3) Sentry integration in logger.ts with conditional initialization. (4) TypeScript migration of 5 core files (constants.ts, timestampUtils.ts, rateLimit.ts, logger.ts, mappers.ts). All 29/29 Vitest tests pass. Demo login flows working. All UI pages render correctly.

minor.issue: Error fetching data toast appears on Manager page - requires Firestore composite index creation

features: enforceMessageRateLimit: Deletes messages exceeding 20/min per user
sendPushNotification: Skips notifications exceeding 30/min per user
checkRateLimit: Transaction-based rate counter in _rate_limits collection
_rate_limits collection blocked from client access in firestore.rules (allow read,write: if false)
Initial fetchAppData limits games to 100 and tournaments to 100
Sentry.init called when VITE_SENTRY_DSN is set and not in dev mode
logger.error captures exceptions or messages to Sentry in production
logger.warn captures warning messages to Sentry

item_4_typescript_migration.description: 5 core utility files migrated to TypeScript
migrated_files: src/constants.ts - ROLES, GAME_STATUS, ASSIGNMENT_STATUS, CONNECTION_STATUS, NOTIFICATION_TYPES, PAYMENT_STATUS + types
item_4_typescript_migration.tsconfig: tsconfig.json with strict mode, allowJs, paths alias

ui_test_results.demo_manager_login: PASS - Click 'Try Demo Account' → 'Log in as Manager' → navigates to /manager
ui_test_results.demo_referee_login: PASS - Click 'Try Demo Account' → 'Log in as Referee' → navigates to /dashboard
ui_test_results.dashboard_page: PASS - Welcome message, stats cards, quick actions visible
ui_test_results.messages_page: PASS - Inbox loads with messages, compose button works
ui_test_results.profile_page: PASS - User info, certifications, Reset Password button visible
ui_test_results.calendar_page: PASS - Monthly calendar with games displayed
ui_test_results.manager_page_tabs: PASS - All 8 tabs visible: Tournaments, Assignments, Roster, Referees, Availability, Leaderboard, Standings, Reports

action_items: Deploy Firestore indexes to resolve 'Error fetching data' toast (firebase deploy --only firestore:indexes)
Deploy Cloud Functions to enable rate limiting (firebase deploy --only functions)

success_rate.backend: N/A (100% Firebase Firestore - no traditional backend)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 4 backlog items verified, 29/29 unit tests pass, all UI flows working)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 33 verified all 4 backlog items: (1) Server-side rate limiting in Cloud Functions, (2) Collection pagination with cursor-based fetchMoreGames/fetchMoreTournaments, (3) Sentry integration in logger.ts, (4) TypeScript migration of 5 core files. All demo login flows working. 29/29 Vitest tests pass. Note: Firestore index error toast appears on Manager page - requires index deployment.
rca_of_issues: N/A — No bugs found. All backlog items implemented correctly. Firestore index error is expected until indexes are deployed.
